title: The weird writing in Episode 13
wikitext:
[]: The weird writing in Episode 13             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 01, 2011 1:03 pm There's one thing I've often wondered about: When Ritsuko and Misato climb into the Magi to defeat Iruel, they find a lots of Notes from Naoko which help them a lot with programing. Most of these are filled with the tipical "gibberish lines" found when writing is presented in comics. However, there is a word smeared across several of these papers which look they it could me actual, if messy, Japanese writing: [URL=http://img641.imageshack.us/i/46457766.png/] [/URL] Is it actual writing? If yes, is it legible or does the script adress it? If yes, what does it say?

[]:             Quote Post by sindy » Sun May 01, 2011 1:29 pm Ikari you idiot...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun May 01, 2011 1:37 pm sindy wrote: Ikari you idiot...

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun May 01, 2011 7:13 pm I saw something new here.On the piece of paper at the leftmost, I see this のるな　　(noru na) へこむ (hekomu) Translated as : Don't ride I am down (feeling low) However, "noru na" can mean not just "don't ride/pilot" but as a shorthand for 気が乗るな ki ga noru na 　(not having interest) or 調子に乗るな choushi ni noru na 　(don't get carried away, don't push your luck). Another ambiguous phrase in Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 01, 2011 7:38 pm Nice find, and nice translation. Now, why? Three reasons: 1 (the most probable). Could be a note to the people telling them, "better safe then sorry," as a reason why she had those notes. 2. Perhaps she was addressing Gendo.. but for what? 3. The plot needed it (but.. if it did, wouldn't it have English subs?).

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 02, 2011 7:03 am symbv wrote: I saw something new here.On the piece of paper at the leftmost, I see this のるな　　(noru na) へこむ (hekomu).

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon May 02, 2011 7:25 am Kendrix wrote: So... this is on the single paper?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 02, 2011 3:22 pm symbv wrote: On the single piece of paper at the leftmost in the pic uploaded. It was written in two lines as I typed them in my post.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 3:47 pm Naoko didn't write that? That's what I assumed when I first watched the series through. Maybe it was Ritsuko, but somehow I assumed it was Naoko foreshadowing (either way, one of them is bitching about Gendo).

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 02, 2011 4:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Naoko didn't write that? That's what I assumed when I first watched the series through. Maybe it was Ritsuko, but somehow I assumed it was Naoko foreshadowing (either way, one of them is bitching about Gendo).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 4:31 pm Misread the thread. And yeah, in Platinum, the large scribble is translated as "Ikari, you jerk!"

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed May 04, 2011 7:40 pm Oh, now that we're talking about writing... Is some of this scrible from Shinji's desk in the ep 26 AU deciphrable? [URL=http://img831.imageshack.us/i/srcibl.png/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 04, 2011 7:44 pm See here, it's explained: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=450106#450106

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed May 04, 2011 8:03 pm LOL, baaad, baad Touji, always teasing the two XD Tough judging by AU!Asuka's obvious jealousy, there miiiiiiiight be just a liiiitle bit of truth to it XD
